page_title: 100% Cotton Disaster Tent Fabric, 520 gr/m'2 - ArCadır 520 - Ariteks
spec_line: 520 g/m², 100% Cotton, Flame Retardant, Antifungal, Waterproof tent fabric. ArÇadir 520
description_blocks: is %100 cotton flame retardant tent fabric. Due to cotton content its ecological choise on tent production.
It is used as military and disaster tent application. The fabric is tested for waterproof and antifungal functions.

Products related to isolation, roofing systems and advertising media. Military and Disaster Tents Fabric.
520 g/m² , 100% Cotton, Flame Retardant, Antifungal, Waterproof tent fabric.

ArÇadir 520 is %100 cotton flame retardant tent fabric. Due to cotton content its ecological choise on tent production. It is used as military and disaster tent application. The fabric is tested for waterproof and antifungal functions.
